subject: Re: [CRITICAL] CPU 98% — API Gateway Overloaded for 15+ Minutes
original_subject: [CRITICAL] CPU 98% — API Gateway Overloaded for 15+ Minutes
body:
Hi Datadog Alerts,
I acknowledge the critical alert regarding the API Gateway's high CPU utilization, which has been over 90% for 18 minutes. I am taking immediate action to address this issue and prevent potential service degradation or outage. I will review the Datadog dashboard for unusual traffic spikes, examine recent deployments, and consider scaling out the nodes as recommended. I expect to have this issue resolved within the next 30 minutes, by which time I will provide an update on the actions taken and the resulting status. 

Best regards,
[Your Name]
